title: Glucose-Stimulated Glucagon Secretion using Biorep Perifusion Machine - Mouse Islets

steps: Isolate mouse islets as described in Mouse Islet Isolation protocol.

Pick the isolated mouse islets into Mouse Islet Culture Media (>90% islet purity). Mouse Islet Culture Media A B 1 500 mL RPMI (11.1mMglucose) Gibco 1875-119 2 50 mL FBS Canadian Origin Gibco12483-020 3 5 mL Penicllin-Streptomycin Gibco15140-122
Culture islets, up to 250 islets in 2 mL in a 35mm culture dish, overnight in incubator at 37°C, 5% CO2.

KRBH solution to be made fresh: A B C 1 mM Final per 100mL total volume 2 NaCl 140 7 mL (2M stock) 3 KCl 3.6 360 µL (1M stock) 4 CaCl2 2.6 260 µL (1M stock) 5 NaH2PO4 0.5 50 µL (1M stock) 6 MgSO4 0.5 50 µL (1M stock) 7 HEPES 5 500 µL (1M stock) 8 NaHCO3 2 0.0168 g 9 Essentially fatty acid free BSA 0.5mg/ml 50 mg Warm above solution to 37°C (approximately 30min to1 hour). After warming the solution, pH to 7.45 with NaOH.
Add glucose and/or additional treatments as required.
Set up the chambers and perifusion machine according to Biorep instructions.
Load islets into each chamber. The number of islets will vary by experiment and sensitivity of ELISA.
Run a 30 min pre-incubation as previously set and discard the perfusate.
Continue to run the perifusion protocol as samples are collected into a clean deep well plate(s).

Upon perifusion protocol is completion, run the chambers dry, so islets are on the filter paper but no liquid remains. Place the filter paper with islets into a 1.5 mL tube with 500 μL of acid ethanol.
Perfusate and islet content samples are stored at -20°C until ELISA
Perfusate is thawed and assayed using MSD glucagon Elisa kits. Vortex content sample and dilute 1:200
If desired, samples are assayed for Insulin using Alpco Stellux mouse insulin ELISA. Vortex islet content and dilute 1:1000.
Acid Ethanol for islet content collection %s %s

Set the protocol with glucose and experimental conditions (high KCl, inhibitors etc) and frequency of collection as needed using a flow rate of 100 μL/min for all steps. Set step 1 of the perifusion protocol to total 30 min. The number of replicates will vary based on number of lanes and plate orientation. This is a preincubation step that should fill one 96 well plate. The perfusate from this step will be disgarded.
creator: Aliya F Spigelman
